economic_hypothesis: Passive spread capture is viable only when queue-adjusted fill probability is high and L2 refill, microprice, depth imbalance and recent aggressive flow imply low post-fill adverse selection. Fill probability and conditional markout are modeled separately; a maker order is never considered filled merely because its price was touched.

data.trade_source: official Binance Vision USD-M daily aggTrades

decision_and_execution.information: last complete one-second depth state and aggressive-flow aggregates only
decision_and_execution.post_only_price: best same-side quote known at decision; order rejected unless that best price is unchanged at arrival
decision_and_execution.queue_ahead: 2x displayed queue plus own order for base; 3x displayed queue plus own order for stress
decision_and_execution.fill: cumulative actual opposing aggressor quantity at or through the order price within 3 seconds must consume queue ahead plus own order
decision_and_execution.own_order: min(1000 USDT notional, 1% of displayed queue)
decision_and_execution.exit: first actual depth quote at or after fill plus 3, 10 or 30 seconds and 100ms latency, maximum emergency quote delay 2 seconds

models.score: predicted fill probability multiplied by predicted gross conditional markout

costs.spread: embedded in maker entry and taker BBO exit

validation_gate: same as selection gate with candidate hyperparameters frozen before validation
terminal_rule: terminal dates may be downloaded and opened in a separate one-shot study only if at least one candidate passes validation
target_gate: net geometric daily return >=0.01 after all validation and terminal gates
